calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Alexander Gorman
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Alexander Gorman, Esq. 916-448-1405 Gorman Law Office for Plaintiff.
Mandarin Interpretr: Aidong Ni is released at 9:01am. Plaintiff's client is not appearing.
Ayanna Jenkins Toney, Esq. 415-439-8388 Law Office for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms, Jenkins-Toney contests motion was not timely served. The Court comments. Mr. Gorman responds; should be moot. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF YINGQIAN WANG's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions.

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion for Order Establishing Admissions is granted. Defendant Ian Phelps having failed to file a timely response to Plaintiff's Set One Requests for Admissions, the facts specified therein are deemed admitted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
